simple_types.name: LEDs
simple_types.code: type LEDs is (Num_Lock, Caps_Lock, Scroll_Lock, Compose, Kana);

simple_types.name: Modifiers
simple_types.code:
type Modifiers is (Ctrl_Left, Shift_Left, Alt_Left, Meta_Left,
                   Ctrl_Right, Shift_Right, Alt_Right, Meta_Right);

tagged_types.name: Instance

subprograms.name: Is_On
subprograms.code: function Is_On (This : Instance; L : LEDs) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if the Host request the given LED to be lit

Return True if there is no more room for keycode in the report
(Max_Key_Codes).

subprograms.name: Push_Key_Code
subprograms.code:
procedure Push_Key_Code (This : in out Instance;
                         Code : UInt8)

documentation.description:
Push keycode in the report, if not full.

Upon return from the Send_Report procedure, the stack is cleared.

subprograms.name: Set_Modifier
